base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_push_start_overlay — a ui (cutscene) from 1986 castlevania. 'PUSH START KEY' red text overlay — appears after logo intro. Blinks on/off while awaiting input. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'PUSH START KEY' red text overlay — appears after logo intro. Blinks on/off while awaiting input
